rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range bounds in type contracts
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Component type contracts should declare assumptions and guarantees using `assume` and `guarantee` keywords
Equation and constant declarations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Guarantees must relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
